---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new diagnostic check, hardening module, or quality-of-life improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["type: feature"]
assignees: []
---

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Concrete user story, not "it would be nice if…".
     Example: "I run vps-rescue against 12 VPSes in a script and I want a
     JSON output mode so I can pipe it to jq." -->

## What you want to happen

<!-- Proposed CLI surface, behaviour, or output. Show the exact command you
     wish you could type and what you'd expect it to print. -->

## Alternatives you considered

<!-- Existing tools, workarounds, other shapes of the same feature. -->

## Scope check

Please confirm the feature is in scope per [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md):

- [ ] It is a diagnostic check, transport, provider integration, hardening
      module, or core CLI improvement.
- [ ] It does NOT require us to operate any server-side infrastructure.
- [ ] It does NOT add closed-source dependencies.
- [ ] It does NOT mutate the VPS without showing the user what runs first.

If any of these are unchecked, please open a discussion first — we'd rather
talk through it than reject a polished PR.
